_comment: Curated upcoming Pokemon TCG sets — son's release radar. Hand-edited. Dates pulled from public announcements; mark 'TBD' if unsure.

sets.name: Monochrome BWR: Reshiram & Zekrom
sets.blurb: Black & White Remix — Reshiram and Zekrom return as the dual face cards in this monochrome-themed Japanese set. The one my son is most hyped about.
sets.search_query: pokemon monochrome BWR reshiram zekrom japanese

sets.name: Mega Brave
sets.blurb: Mega Evolution returns in force — Mega Lucario, Mega Garchomp and Mega Salamence headline the bravado-themed expansion.

sets.name: Mega Symphonia
sets.blurb: Sequel to Mega Brave — features Mega Gardevoir, Mega Rayquaza, and Mega Diancie as the chase cards.

sets.name: Destined Rivals
sets.blurb: Scarlet & Violet — Destined Rivals. Team's Pokemon return with Team Rocket, Cynthia, and Marnie trainer-themed cards.
sets.search_query: pokemon destined rivals booster box ETB

sets.name: Black Bolt & White Flare
sets.blurb: English release of the Japanese 'Black Bolt' and 'White Flare' twin sets — the Unova-themed comeback with Reshiram and Zekrom anchors.
sets.search_query: pokemon black bolt white flare ETB

sets.name: Journey Together
sets.blurb: First English Scarlet & Violet set of 2025. Introduces Ace Spec cards back into rotation and trainer-tag Pokemon.

sets.name: Prismatic Evolutions
sets.blurb: Eeveelution-focused special set — Umbreon ex, Sylveon ex, and the chase Umbreon ex SIR have driven sealed prices to record highs.
sets.search_query: pokemon prismatic evolutions ETB booster bundle

sets.name: Surging Sparks
sets.blurb: Pikachu ex hyper rare led one of the most popular Scarlet & Violet sets — sealed product still climbing.
sets.search_query: pokemon surging sparks ETB booster box
